issue.title: kissjav.com

labels.name: T: Incorrect Blocking
labels.description: Website or app not working properly due to filtering

issue.body:
### Issue URL (Incorrect Blocking) [NSFW] [https://kissjav.com/#](https://adguardteam.github.io/AnonymousRedirect/redirect.html?url=https%3A%2F%2Fkissjav.com%2F%23) ### Comment > 에드가드가 켜져있을 경우 영상의 썸네일이 나오지 않음, 사이트의 모든 버튼이 눌리지 않음 ### [NSFW] Screenshots [Screenshot 1](https://cdn.adguardcdn.com/sitereports/ssbjfz79ezkg0ss0c0k4cw00w00ogk464ffe3si2nc.png?nc=1) [Screenshot 1 with AdGuard disabled](https://cdn.adguardcdn.com/sitereports/mqsx2wkpcj4o8kw4w00ko0gss0scgg8n4jsq0ouois.png?nc=1) ### System configuration | Information | Value | |-------------|-------| AdGuard product: | AdGuard Browser Extension v5.4.3.67 MV3 System version: | `Windows 10` Browser: | Chrome Filters: | **Ad Blocking:**
AdGuard Base filter

**Other:**
Filter unblocking search ads and self-promotion

**Language-specific:**
List-KR Filters last update: | 2026-06-18T09:01:23Z ### Issue configuration [Import](https://reports.adguard.com/settings/import.html?scheme_version=4&product_type=ext&product_version=5.4.3.67&system_version=Windows+10&ext.manifest_version=3&browser=chrome&regular_filters=2%2C10%2C227&filters_last_update=2026-06-18T09%3A01%3A23Z&stealth.enabled=0)
